description: A screenshot-style graphic reproducing a Truth Social / X post from Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump) on a white background. Top-left shows the circular avatar with Trump's face stylized as a U.S. flag (blue stars over one eye, red-and-white stripes), beside the bold black 'Donald J. Trump' name, a pink/magenta checkmark badge, and a dark square Truth Social app icon, with the grey '@realDonaldTrump' handle below. The post body is in large black sans-serif, largely in all-caps, reading verbatim: 'I HOPE EVERYBODY AT REDEDICATE 250 IS HAVING A GOOD TIME. IF THERE IS ANYTHING I CAN DO TO HELP, JUST HAVE OUR BEAUTIFUL, BOTH INSIDE AND OUT, RACHAEL C.D., GIVE ME A CALL. I'M BACK FROM CHINA!!! President DJT'.
notable_text: I HOPE EVERYBODY AT REDEDICATE 250 IS HAVING A GOOD TIME... RACHAEL C.D., GIVE ME A CALL. I'M BACK FROM CHINA!!! President DJT
